title: Is it possible that date range comes in view automatically when we click on a board item in Gantt Chart?
excerpt: Can the exact date range of the board item come into view whenever we click on a board item in gantt chart?

posts.author: shivani.jolly (Shivani Jolly)
posts.cookedHtml: Can the exact date range of the board item come into view whenever we click on a board item in gantt chart?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @shivani.jolly,

This is a great suggestion, however a feature I am afraid that is not currently supported - sorry for the setback! That said, please feel free to post this as a feature request via Submit an Idea - monday Community Forum
